steps.title: Constant work rate produces a linear relationship
steps.content:
The inspector works at a constant rate, checking the same number of shirts per unit time. If she starts with $N$ shirts and checks $r$ shirts per unit time, then after time $t$:
$$\text{Remaining} = N - rt$$

steps.title: The negative coefficient indicates the slope direction
steps.content: The equation $\text{Remaining} = N - rt$ is linear with slope $-r$. Since the slope is negative, remaining shirts decrease at a constant rate as time increases. That matches choice B — B is correct.
